axe.description: Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space
axe.help: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

nodes.summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size (117.3px by 18px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 15.2px instead of at least 24px.
